Privacy, Refunds & Contact

Last updated: February 2026

On this page

Privacy Policy Refund Policy Contact
01 / Privacy

Privacy Policy

Relay Reports is a privacy-first audit tool. Your Zapier data never leaves your browser — all processing happens locally using WebAssembly (WASM).

✅ We do not upload, store, or transmit your Zapier export files. Everything is processed in your browser.

What we collect

  • Google Analytics — anonymous usage data (page views, feature usage). No personal identifiers. You can opt out via browser extensions.
  • Email address — collected by Lemon Squeezy at checkout. Used to deliver your license key and send receipts. We do not use it for marketing without consent.
  • Payment data — handled entirely by Lemon Squeezy and Stripe. We never see or store your card details.

Third-party services

  • Google Analytics — analytics.google.com
  • Lemon Squeezy — payments and license key delivery (lemonsqueezy.com)
  • Stripe — payment processing via Lemon Squeezy (stripe.com)
  • Vercel — static site hosting (vercel.com)

We do not sell your data to third parties.

02 / Refunds

Refund Policy

We want you to be satisfied with Relay Reports. Because the Continuity Report is a digital product generated instantly in your browser, we handle refunds as follows:

  • Within 7 days of purchase — full refund if the product did not work as described. Contact us with your order ID.
  • After 7 days — refunds are evaluated case by case. We will always try to resolve the issue first.
  • License key already used — refunds are not available after the license key has been redeemed and the report has been generated.

⚠️ To request a refund, email us at support@relayreports.app with your order ID from Lemon Squeezy.

We respond to all refund requests within 2 business days.

03 / Contact

Contact

Have a question, issue, or feedback? We're here to help.

Email Support

support@relayreports.app

We respond within 2 business days.

© 2026 Relay Reports · Legal · Built with Rust & WASM · Privacy-First
